title: SCP-303, The Doorman
description: A terrifying presence that appears behind doors and fills you with fear.
body:
The Doorman adds a new monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-303, also known as The Doorman.


SCP-303 is an invisible humanoid anomaly that manifests when players attempt to close doors. Though rarely seen, its presence is unmistakable, marked by growling from the other side. Once spawned, it prevents players from opening the door out of sheer fear, and only the bravest may dare to try. But those who do will regret it, as SCP-303 will attack viciously upon being disturbed.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-303 spawn?

SCP-303 spawns only if the difficulty is not peaceful, and a player in survival or adventure mode opens a door with a 5% chance. If the door got closed, it will spawn in that door and if a player opens it again, SCP-303 will spawn and attack.

</details>



![SCP-303](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/545727eff4d3ba3eb42eb70587f8db567c69a578.png)

SCP-303 can randomly spawn  with a 5% chance when a player closes a door when the difficulty is not Peaceful and the player is in Survival or Adventure mode, and no other SCP-303 exists in the world. Once it spawns, it remains invisible but emits deep growling sounds. If the player comes within 4 blocks, they receive the message “You’re too afraid to open the door” and are afflicted with extreme slowness, weakness, and mining fatigue. Opening a door that SCP-303 occupies triggers a loud scare sound, short blindness, and causes it to become aggressive. While active, SCP-303 constantly emits fear that inflicts nausea, weakness, slowness, and mining fatigue to all players within 6 blocks. It moves quickly and deals heavy damage, but its health is relatively low. If no player is within 16 blocks, SCP-303 despawns until the next time you dare to touch a door.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
